svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
svg.title: Multi-stage Dockerfile build: builder stage compiles, runner stage ships a slim image
svg.desc: Left column shows the Builder stage based on node:20 with WORKDIR, package copy, npm install, and source copy. Right column shows the Runner stage on node:20-slim receiving artifacts via COPY --from=builder, exposing port 8018, and starting node server.js. The final image is pushed to a registry.
